name: fix-sql-injection
description: Fix the SQL injection vulnerability in this code. Never trust raw string formatting for SQL.
context:
import sqlite3

def get_user_by_name(conn, name):
    """Get user by name - VULNERABLE to SQL injection!"""
    query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '{name}'"
    cursor = conn.execute(query)
    return cursor.fetchone()

def delete_user(conn, user_id):
    """Delete user by id - also vulnerable"""
    query = f"DELETE FROM users WHERE id = {user_id}"
    conn.execute(query)
    conn.commit()
expected: Fixed with parameterized queries, tests proving injection is blocked
